name: Hyper Psychic Blaster/Assault Mode
effectText: Cannot be Normal Summoned/Set. Must be Special Summoned with "Assault Mode Activate". At the end of the Damage Step, if this card battled an opponent's monster: Inflict damage to your opponent equal to that opponent's monster's DEF, also gain LP equal to its ATK. When this card on the field is destroyed: You can target 1 "Hyper Psychic Blaster" in your GY; Special Summon that target.
